nasb.text: Therefore it is said in the Book of the Wars of the Lord, “Waheb in Suphah, And the wadis of the Arnon,

esv.text: Therefore it is said in the Book of the Wars of the Lord, “Waheb in Suphah, and the valleys of the Arnon,

cnv.text: 因此，在耶和華的戰書上記著： “在蘇法的哇哈伯， 和亞嫩河的河谷，

ccb.text: 因此，耶和华的战记上说：“苏法的哇哈伯，亚嫩河谷，
